targets.query:
latest_run = (from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "throughput" and r._field == "throughput_mbps")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)).run_id

from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "throughput" and r._field == "throughput_mbps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id == latest_run)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.agent_id and r.agent_id != "")
  |> group(columns: ["agent_id"])

latest_run = (from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "run_summary" and r._field == "sync_offset_ms")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)).run_id

from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "run_summary" and r._field == "sync_offset_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id == latest_run)
  |> group(columns: ["agent_id"])
  |> last()

latest_run = (from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "throughput" and r._field == "throughput_mbps")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)).run_id

latest_start = (from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "throughput" and r._field == "throughput_mbps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id == latest_run)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0))._time

from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: latest_start)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ap_airtime" and r._field == "tx_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.agent_id and r.agent_id != "")
  |> group(columns: ["agent_id"])

latest_run = (from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "throughput" and r._field == "throughput_mbps")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)).run_id

from(bucket: "atf_metrics")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "throughput" and r._field == "throughput_mbps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.run_id == latest_run)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.agent_id and r.agent_id != "")
  |> group(columns: ["agent_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> keep(columns: ["agent_id", "_value"])
